rag_rules: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for branching logic
Place input assumptions and output guarantees in component type scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Relate outputs to inputs in dependency guarantees
Use helper declarations to simplify complex expressions
Avoid AADL property names in AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constants
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar types (e.g., integer, boolean)
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
AGREE scalar type names must be lowercase
